info.name: SoulBuddy Chat API
info.description:
Postman collection for the SoulBuddy backend.

**Folders:**
- **Health** — server health check
- **Chat — Incognito** — anonymous chat (no auth required)
- **Chat — Cognito** — authenticated chat (Supabase JWT required)
- **Conversations** — retrieve message history (auth required)
- **Insights** — per-session metrics, summaries, weekly growth, user memory (auth required)
- **Classify** — standalone message classification (auth required)
- **Guardrail** — out-of-scope / guardrail detection (auth required)
- **Examples** — saved example requests and responses for every endpoint

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection.
2. Import `SoulBuddy.postman_environment.json` and select it as the active environment.
3. For cognito / auth-required requests, set `supabase_token` to a valid Supabase JWT.
4. Set `conversation_id` to a UUID returned by a previous `/chat` response to continue a session or test per-session endpoints.

request.description: Returns server status and connectivity of all services (data DB, auth DB, Supabase, Redis).

response.name: 200 OK — all services healthy
response.body:
{
  "status": "healthy",
  "server": "running",
  "data_database": "connected",
  "auth_database": "connected",
  "supabase": "connected"
}

item.name: Chat — Incognito (anonymous)
item.description:
No Authorization header required. `is_incognito` must be `true`. Conversation history is session-scoped — pass the `conversation_id` returned in the first response as `sb_conv_id` to continue the same session.

**New fields (all optional with defaults):**
- `chat_mode`: `default` | `reflection` | `venting` | `therapist` (default: `default`)
- `chat_preference`: `general` | ... (default: `general`)
- `language`: BCP-47 tag (e.g. `en-IN`, `hi-IN`, `ta-IN`) — default: `en-in`

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Hello, how are you?",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "default",
  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Start a new anonymous conversation. No `sb_conv_id` needed — one is generated and returned in the response.

response.name: 200 OK — new session
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "response": "Hi! I'm here to help. What's on your mind?",
  "intent": "greeting",
  "domain": "student"
}

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I'm feeling stressed about my exams.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": "{{conversation_id}}",
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "venting",
  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Continue an existing anonymous conversation. Set `{{conversation_id}}` in the environment to the UUID returned in the previous response.

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Hello, how are you?",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "default",
  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Streaming version of the incognito chat endpoint. Returns server-sent events (SSE). Each event is a `data:` line containing a JSON chunk. The stream ends with a final `data: [DONE]` event.

response.name: 200 OK — SSE stream

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I'm feeling stressed about my exams.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": "{{conversation_id}}",
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "reflection",
  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Continue an existing anonymous conversation with streaming. Set `{{conversation_id}}` in the environment.

item.name: Chat — Cognito (authenticated)
item.description:
Requires a valid Supabase JWT in the `Authorization: Bearer` header. `is_incognito` must be `false`. The `supabase_uid` is always derived from the token — never pass it in the request body.

**New fields (all optional with defaults):**
- `chat_mode`: `default` | `reflection` | `venting` | `therapist` (default: `default`)
- `chat_preference`: `general` | ... (default: `general`)
- `language`: BCP-47 tag (e.g. `en-IN`, `hi-IN`, `ta-IN`) — default: `en-in`

header.description: Supabase JWT — required for cognito mode

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Hello, how are you?",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "default",
  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Start a new authenticated conversation. The server verifies the JWT and derives `supabase_uid` from it automatically.

response.name: 200 OK — authenticated session
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "response": "Welcome back! How can I help you today?",
  "intent": "greeting",
  "domain": "student"
}

response.name: 401 — missing token

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I'm feeling stressed about my exams.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": "{{conversation_id}}",
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "therapist",
  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Continue an existing authenticated conversation. Set `{{conversation_id}}` in the environment.

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Hello, how are you?",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "default",
  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Streaming authenticated chat. Returns SSE. Requires a valid Supabase JWT.

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I'm feeling stressed about my exams.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": "{{conversation_id}}",
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "reflection",
  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

request.description: Continue an existing authenticated conversation with streaming.

item.name: Conversations
item.description: Retrieve conversation history and decrypted messages. All endpoints require a valid Supabase JWT. Messages stored with encryption are transparently decrypted before being returned.

request.description: Retrieve all conversations for the authenticated user, each with its full decrypted message list. Ordered newest-first.

response.name: 200 OK
401 — missing or invalid token

request.description: Retrieve all decrypted messages for a specific conversation. Set `{{conversation_id}}` in the environment to the target UUID. Returns 404 if the conversation does not exist or belongs to another user.

response.name: 200 OK
400 — invalid conversation_id
401 — missing or invalid token
404 — not found or wrong user

item.name: Insights
item.description: Intelligence-layer data: per-session metrics, session summaries, weekly growth trend, and long-term user memory. All endpoints require a valid Supabase JWT. Per-session endpoints verify that the conversation belongs to the authenticated user before returning data.

request.description: Return all insight metrics computed for a session: `emotional_stability_score`, `engagement_score`, `progress_score`, `risk_score`, `mode_preference`. Returns 404 if the conversation does not belong to the authenticated user.

response.name: 200 OK — metrics returned
400 — invalid conversation_id
401 — missing or invalid token
404 — not found or wrong user

request.description:
Return the session summary for a conversation. Returns the final holistic summary if the session is finalised, otherwise the latest incremental summary. Checks Redis cache first (TTL 30 min).

Summaries are generated every 5 bot turns (incremental) and finalised when a new session starts.

response.name: 200 OK — incremental summary
200 OK — no summary yet
400 — invalid conversation_id
401 — missing or invalid token
404 — not found or wrong user

request.description: Return the most recent weekly growth score for the authenticated user. The score is a linear regression slope over the last 7 session `progress_score` values — positive = improving, negative = worsening, near-zero = stable.

response.name: 200 OK — growth data available
200 OK — not enough data
401 — missing or invalid token

request.description:
Return the authenticated user's long-term memory record: `growth_summary`, `recurring_themes`, `behavioral_patterns`, `emotional_baseline`, `preferred_modes`, `risk_signals`. Checks Redis cache first (TTL 2 h).

Used by the frontend profile page to display the user's growth journey.

response.name: 200 OK — memory record found
200 OK — no memory yet
401 — missing or invalid token

item.name: Classify
item.description: Standalone message classification endpoint. Runs the SoulBuddyClassifier model to return intent, situation, severity, and risk score without generating a chat response. Requires a valid Supabase JWT.

request.description: Classify a user message into intent, situation, severity, and risk categories. Uses the SoulBuddyClassifier ML model. Useful for testing the classifier in isolation without going through the full chat graph.

response.name: 200 OK — classification result
401 — missing or invalid token
500 — classification failed

item.name: Guardrail
item.description: Out-of-scope and guardrail detection endpoint. Determines whether a message is within the mental wellness domain or should be blocked / redirected. Requires a valid Supabase JWT.

request.description: Evaluate a message against the out-of-scope guardrail for the given domain. Returns a `guardrail` object indicating whether the message is in-scope, out-of-scope, or requires special handling. Useful for testing guardrail logic in isolation.

response.name: 200 OK — out of scope (general knowledge)
200 OK — in scope (mental wellness)
401 — missing or invalid token

item.name: Examples
item.description: Ready-to-run requests with realistic payloads and saved example responses covering every endpoint and common scenarios.

response.name: All services healthy
response.body:
{
  "status": "healthy",
  "server": "running",
  "data_database": "connected",
  "auth_database": "connected",
  "supabase": "connected"
}

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I have exams next week and I feel completely overwhelmed. I don't even know where to start.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "venting",
  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

response.name: 200 OK — new session created

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I have exams next week and I feel completely overwhelmed. I don't even know where to start.",
  "is_incognito": true,

  "chat_preference": "general",
  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null
}

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "response": "That sounds really tough. Exam pressure can feel all-consuming. Let's take it one step at a time — what subject feels the most daunting right now?",
  "intent": "VENTING",
  "situation": "EXAM_ANXIETY",
  "severity": "medium",
  "domain": "student"
}

body.raw:
{
  "message": "Mostly maths. I keep blanking on formulas under pressure.",
  "is_incognito": true,
  "sb_conv_id": "3fa85f64-5717-4562-b3fc-2c963f66afa6",
  "domain": "student",
  "chat_mode": "therapist",

  "language": "en-IN",

  "success": true,

  "response": "Blanking under pressure is very common and it's not a reflection of how much you know. Have you tried writing out formulas by hand a few times — even without looking? It builds muscle memory that tends to survive stress better than pure memorisation.",
  "intent": "SEEKING_ADVICE",
  "situation": "EXAM_ANXIETY",
  "severity": "medium",
  "domain": "student"
}

body.raw:
{

body.raw:
{
  "message": "I haven't slept properly in two weeks and I'm starting to feel like nothing matters anymore.",
  "is_incognito": false,
  "sb_conv_id": null,
  "domain": "student",

response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "conversation_id": "7cb12d34-8891-4abc-a1b2-3c4d5e6f7a8b",
  "response": "Thank you for trusting me with this. Two weeks without proper sleep and feeling like nothing matters sounds really serious, and I want to make sure you're safe. Are you having any thoughts of hurting yourself?",
  "intent": "VENTING",
  "situation": "BURNOUT",
  "severity": "high",
  "risk_level": "medium",
  "is_crisis_detected": true,
  "domain": "student"
}

response.name: 401 — missing token

body.raw:

  "language": "en-IN",
  "metadata": null

  "domain": "student",

  "situation": "BURNOUT",
  "severity": "high",

}
